components_analyzed.reason: IBM AIX 7.2 standard (premier) support ended April 30, 2023. Extended support contracts exist but at additional cost; without confirmation of an active extended support agreement, this is classified EOL. The system is running a proprietary UNIX platform with no community support pathway.

COBOL-2014 references the ISO/IEC 1989:2014 standard, which has been superseded by COBOL 2023 (ISO/IEC 1989:2023). IBM COBOL for AIX runtime remains supported, but the language standard and typical ecosystem tooling for COBOL-2014 is outdated relative to modern development practices. Developer availability is extremely limited.

Oracle Database 19c Premier Support ended January 31, 2024. It is currently in Extended Support (available until January 31, 2027, with additional fees). As of mid-2026, the application is in the Extended Support window — still vendor-supported but at extra cost and classified as OUTDATED.
